title: How 'ambitious' new coach Wilson plans to grow Irish cricket | Cricket News
description: Ireland's new men's cricket head coach Gary Wilson tells BBC Sport NI about his ambitions for the job and how the team can build on the historic win over India.

blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: How 'ambitious' new coach Wilson plans to grow Irish cricket. Ireland's new men's cricket head coach Gary Wilson tells BBC Sport NI about his ambitions for the job and how the team can build on the historic win over India.
